front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body, standing idle pose. The character is a Mnemonist — a robed mage in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. They wear a long dark purple robe decorated with memory crystals, a hood with rune trim. They wield an orb-mounted staff and have a floating arcane tome hovering nearby. Three memory crystals dangle from their waist belt. Colors: deep purple, gold accents, teal and crimson glow. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing on borders, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
